rulings.Case Title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. FORTIER, GLORIA I.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 27, 2011, line 1. PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. A hearing is required. Defendant must provide proof of medical expenses and amount of child support or other financial assistance if any. If defendant needs additional time to gather the information, the court will set a new hearing date. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 27, 2011, line 3.
